content.en:
Go on the scamp.

The many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Beifeng family naturally heard the meaning of the words.

However, they were really moved.

Now, the Beifeng family is in a very dangerous situation, and as soon as Beizu died, the former relationship network was weakened.

Although there are also forces willing to protect them, the price paid is too great, and it can almost be regarded as annexing their Beifeng family.

Moreover, the potential of those forces is not the same as that of Fengya Island.

The Endless Lord of Wind Tooth Island is the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has opened up the fourth path, and his strength is very strong, and the Beifeng family has also heard of it.

If Wind Tooth Island shelters them, the crisis will naturally be resolved, except for those nine overlord-level forces, no top force is willing to offend Wind Tooth Island, let alone those top forces that do not have a Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

However, they won't agree casually, and they have to listen to the conditions of Wind Tooth Island.

"Lord of Wind Fang, what are the conditions of your Wind Tooth Island?" asked the Lord of Beitang.

The Lord of Wind Tooth said: "It's very simple, give up two domains to our Wind Tooth Island, and don't want anything else!"

"What, two domains !!!"

The face of the Lord of Beitang changed.

This condition was very harsh, and he naturally did not want to agree.

Then.

The Lord of the Wind Teeth said: "Lord of Beitang, your Beifeng family's strength has now dropped greatly, and there is even a possibility of annihilation, and you have the territory of three domains, and giving up one domain is only a reduction in territory for you, and your own strength has not decreased. Besides, do you think that with your current strength, you still occupy the territory of the three domains, and other forces will be willing? Think about it, our Wind Tooth Island is now willing to protect you, this is a gift to you. If we want to invade this place, can you stop it, and we, the Endless Lord of Stormtooth Island, can easily destroy you. "

The words of the Lord of the Wind Teeth were arrogant, and even had a hint of threat.

However, the Lord of Beitang did not dare to be angry, because the current Beifeng family really can't afford to offend the Lord of Endless, even if Beizu has not fallen, he can't afford to offend the Lord of Endless!

"Lord of Beitang, think about it carefully!"

The Lord of the Windfangs has taken his leave.

Soon, the Lord of the Wind Tooth came back to Wind Tooth Island, explained the situation, and then waited for the results of the discussion of the Beifeng family.

And the news that Fengya Island was interested in the Beifeng family also spread, and several Origin Upper Realm overlords who were interested in the Beifeng family directly gave up this idea, they didn't dare to compete with the Endless Lord for the territory and resources of the Beifeng family!

As for those incomparably top-notch Origin Upper Realm overlords, they can't look down on the Beifeng family!

The days that followed.

After some discussion, one of the Heavenly Ancestors of the Northern Feng Family finally decided to seek the refuge of Fengya Island.

Otherwise, the Beifeng family will not be able to survive the next crisis.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

"Lord of Endless, the Beifeng family has agreed to our request!"

The Lord of the Windfangs was excited.

"That's good, Fengya Island can be relocated to the central part!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Next, Fengya Island began to relocate.

This time, the two domains that the Beifeng family gave up were the Hanging Mountain Domain and the Stygian Mountain Domain, and as for the Beifeng Domain occupied by the Beifeng Family, it was the best domain among the three domains, and it also had the most resources.

The Beifeng family is reluctant to give up the Beifeng domain, which is also very normal.

Wind Tooth Island was also very satisfied, after all, the Hanging Mountain Domain and the Stygian Mountain Domain were also huge, and there were also a lot of resources, and they could also cultivate a lot of geniuses from the other side.

Sometime.

Fengya Island can recruit other shore-level geniuses from these two domains, and it can also recruit a lot, and there will be no shortage of top-level geniuses from the other side in the future.

And the original Fengya Island has also become a branch.

Of course.

Fengya Island will also have to change its name in the future and change it to Tianshan Pavilion, which is located on the Taixuan Mountain Range, a treasure land in the Hanging Mountain Domain.

Regarding the matter of changing the name, the Lord of the Wind Tooth naturally has no opinion, and the Lord of the Wind Tooth is still the Lord of the Wind Tooth Island, and he is also the deputy pavilion master of the Tianshan Pavilion, and the pavilion master has become Ye Tian.

After that, a group of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Wind Tooth Pavilion moved to the Tianshan Pavilion, and at the same time began to recruit a group of other side level geniuses, but this matter was handed over to the Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain to deal with, and Ye Tian did not interfere.

He just came forward and announced that he had blessed the Beifeng family, as well as announcing that the Tianshan Pavilion was his.

After that, he began to practice in retreat.

The years passed.

Before you know it, another 10 million primeval years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation has improved again, and it is not too far from the third balance, this is also the last time he harvested too many resources, otherwise, he would not be able to improve to this level so quickly.

this day.

Yanzu sent a message.

"Lord of Endless, the last more than a million primeval eras, don't go to the ruins of reincarnation!"

Hearing this message, Ye Tian was a little surprised, why couldn't he go to the ruins of reincarnation?

Soon.

He found that the nine overlord-level forces had withdrawn all of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors from the ruins of reincarnation, and the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors could not enter the ruins of reincarnation through the overlord-level forces.

It was as if in a short period of time, all the forces and the Overlords of the Origin Upper Realm had withdrawn from the ruins of reincarnation.

He was very curious about what was going on in the ruins of reincarnation, so he went to Yan Zu to find out the situation.

......

"Yanzu, what the hell happened?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yan Zu hurriedly explained: "Endless Lord, you have not been the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm for a short time, so naturally it is not clear. The ruins of reincarnation are the end of the land on the other side of eternity, and they are dangerous in themselves. But for us Origin Upper Realm Overlords, if we don't die in normal times, we won't encounter danger. But there are sometimes exceptions, such as the coming time, if you don't come out of the ruins of reincarnation, there is a high chance of falling. "

"Why?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yan Zu said: "Because a large number of reincarnation golden insects are about to appear in the ruins of reincarnation, where did this reincarnation golden insect come from, I don't know, I only know that the strength of the reincarnation golden insect is terrifying, which is equivalent to the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and the number is heavy again, and there are even reincarnation golden insects comparable to eight awakenings." The key point is that the Reincarnation Golden Worm is even more hostile to our Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and it is easy to be besieged and killed. So, at this time, we all withdraw to the ruins of samsara, and they will not be killed on the other side of eternity. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

But.

His other replica bodies were not ready to withdraw from the ruins of reincarnation, but were more interested in the reincarnation golden worm.
